title: Adventures & Explores
description: Mod adding new material - azurite, loot boxes and new currency.
body:
This mod adds a new material - azurite, 
from which you can create new items, 
something between diamonds and netherite. 
The mod also adds a new way of cooking 
and a loot box that can be upgraded 
and you can get random loot that will upgrade. 
The mod also improves the forest 
and adds a new structure.

The mod also adds a new currency - 
coins, namely copper, silver, gold and diamond. 
You can get them through trade with residents or through loot boxes

A new rare currency is also being offered - ruby ​​tokens. 
They can only be obtained from Master-level villagers. 
They can be sold for cool things
